感谢感谢🙏🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756054202,"group_id":"7523501557166378046","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1275057678329399"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7523501557166378046","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"180"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":81317,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7532707645231039294","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常精彩 非常好看的现言男女互换文 无重生 无系统 日常平实生活的点点滴滴（最爱这样式的 很真 就像身边发生的事） 突出的核心就是故事的推动对男女互换后身体不同表现造成的生理 心理差异 反应及尴尬矛盾 作者尤其对微小动作 神态的描写超接地气 语言精炼 风趣幽默 逻辑通顺 两主都是戏精 绝对的双商在线 反传统（看过这么多互换文里 可没“噗”一声 可没拉肚子的交响乐[偷笑]）并且脑洞跟读者超同步 真的太好看了 希望大大别换回 文长点 让俺有精神食粮 可以期盼追更[酷]感谢作者大大这么好的脑洞及文笔！ 真心感谢🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻[微笑] @两只串串猫","text_exts":[{"e":282,"s":276,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3bnTs/uO7w1axsX32/1dQuv4czCj3VWKYOcmqOqzFXk"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753850672,"group_id":"7523501557166378046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3IusKc4AquOXr64ofNJBgJQbW61MFqIIr4ZcOXBpTYc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1275057678329399","user_name":"老天不公的郑娇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1275057678329399","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7523501557166378046","book_info":{"abstract":"新书已上架，宝子们帮我维持维持人气，谢谢啦！
一个写扑街网文的帅气男主。
一个绝美身材超好的霸道女总裁。
两个人意外互换了身体。
女主变成了男人，她把想干的事都干了！
男主变成了女人。他把能干不能干的事都干了……
不同的人生体验，酸甜苦辣咸的生活方式，让两个人生不可能交织的男女相爱相杀！
一场啼笑皆非的闹剧就这样展开了！
本书主要描写男女主互掐，斗智斗勇的搞笑日常。
感谢各位看官老爷支持！
